nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约
nodes.summary: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联90种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、环颈鸭、赤琵嘴鴨等90种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 布宜诺斯艾利斯省
nodes.summary: 布宜诺斯艾利斯省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括棕头草雁、Red-and-white crake、查科林鴞等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 圭亚那 (地区)
nodes.summary: 圭亚那 (地区)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联92种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、Black curassow、纯色秧鸡等92种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 红翎毛翅燕
nodes.summary: 红翎毛翅燕（Southern rough-winged swallow，学名 Stelgidopteryx ruficollis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于路易·皮埃尔·维埃约、布宜诺斯艾利斯省、圭亚那 (地区)。

links.key: bird-红翎毛翅燕-a1bef508__distributed_in__loc-路易-皮埃尔-维埃约-d872b74a
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: |year=2020 |title=Southern Rough-winged Swallow Stelgidopteryx ruficollis |volume=2020 |article-number=e.T22712162A137675816 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2020-3.RLTS.T22712162A137675816.en |access-date=20 January 2026}} | genus = Stelgidopteryx | species = ruficollis | authority = (Vieillot, 1817) | range_map = Stelgidopteryx ruficollis map.svg }} The southern rough-winged swallow (Stelgidopteryx ruficollis) a species of bird in the family Hirundinidae, the swallows and martins. It is found in Central America from Honduras south, in every mainland South American country except Chile, on Trinidad, and as a vagrant to Aruba, Bonaire, Curaçao, Tobago, and the Falkland Islands.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

links.key: bird-红翎毛翅燕-a1bef508__distributed_in__loc-布宜诺斯艾利斯省-7df6a0bd
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: ruficollis: from southeastern Colombia south through eastern Ecuador, eastern Peru, and eastern Bolivia into northern and northeastern Argentina as far as Buenos Aires Province; from there east across southern and eastern Venezuela, the Guianas, and all of Brazil, Paraguay, and Uruguay The species has been documented as a vagrant on the Caribbean islands of Aruba, Bonaire, Curaçao, and Tobago that are arrayed along the north coast of South America, and also far to the southeast on the Falkland Islands. The southern rough-winged swallow inhabits a variety of open landscapes, especially those that have water features
